headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -118.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 61% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 170 quotes and 143 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger with exceptional force today.

• At 102.4, frustrations are running well above typical levels but still within the upper range seen over the past 74 days.

• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday's high while optimism improved slightly but remains deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
